creator: jadawin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, 06 Mar 2008, jadawin@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [UPDATE PORT] sysutils/mcron: update to 1.0.4
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: jadawin
> State-Changed-When: Thu Mar 6 17:05:15 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Ask for submitter fix.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=121323

Thanks for the submission, but it doesn't deinstall cleanly.

=== Checking filesystem state
list of extra files and directories in / (not present before this port
was installed but present after it was deinstalled)
14649816        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel
512 Mar  6 16:48 usr/local/share/guile/site
14649817        4 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel
512 Mar  6 16:48 usr/local/share/guile/site/mcron
Deleting guile-1.8.4_2
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory
'/usr/local/share/guile'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list
is
incorrectly specified?)

Regards,


-- 
Philippe Audeoud
FreeBSD Committer	| jadawin@FreeBSD.org
